jsonLd.title: EaseMyTrip is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Join the EaseMyTrip family as a E-commerce Executive in Thane. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About EaseMyTrip:
EaseMyTrip is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with EaseMyTrip!
